place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Jungle-View Pool Villa with 12-Metre Pool, Lamai
blurb: A stylish three-bedroom villa above Lamai with a twelve-metre private pool, a poolside sala and a green jungle-and-mountain outlook. Single-storey living on a generous 593 m² plot, delivered fully furnished. ฿11,200,000.
detail:
Set on a generous 593 m² plot in the Lamai hills, this single-storey villa looks out over jungle and mountain, its twelve-metre private pool stretching along a sun terrace beneath a covered sala. With 240 m² of built space, it is designed around easy indoor-outdoor living, a short drive from Lamai's beach and town.

The open living level runs from a timber-and-white kitchen with a central island through living and dining areas that slide open to the pool. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and a garden or pool outlook, with air-conditioning throughout and full furnishing.

The long pool, lawn and sala make the most of the green setting and the light. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 27 years and 7 months remaining, running to February 2054. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
